global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a focus on travel booking.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel easily.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Two overlapping shapes
elements.description: Two geometric shapes, one oval and one rectangle, overlapping in a lighter shade of orange.

elements.label: Abstract design element
elements.description: An abstract design element that adds visual interest, possibly a decorative shape.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Book your next trip' positioned centrally.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: WayPoint logo
elements.description: The logo 'WayPoint' in a prominent font, displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Shop now' at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text at the top right corner.

elements.label: User-generated content label
elements.description: A small label reading 'UGC' in white text on a circular background at the top left.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, travel booking, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, Hotels + flights in one tap, WayPoint, Shop now, SALE, UGC
